input: Run plugin builder on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected plugin builder output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the plugin builder workflow

input: Apply plugin builder to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive plugin builder analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to plugin builder
